scripts.auth:generate:schema: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const importPath=path.join(process.cwd(),'src/lib/auth/index.ts').split(path.sep).join('/'); const source='import { getAuth } from \'' + importPath + '\';\nexport const auth = getAuth();\n'; fs.writeFileSync('/tmp/mi-copi-better-auth.config.ts', source);" && DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-postgres://user:password@localhost:5432/mi_copi}" BETTER_AUTH_SECRET="${BETTER_AUTH_SECRET:-test-secret}" BETTER_AUTH_URL="${BETTER_AUTH_URL:-http://localhost:3000}" GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID="${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:-test-google-client-id}" GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET="${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET:-test-google-client-secret}" node node_modules/@better-auth/cli/dist/index.mjs generate --config /tmp/mi-copi-better-auth.config.ts --output /tmp/mi-copi-better-auth.generated.ts --yes
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
